chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 53 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection as at ‘A’. 2) For hearing of CMA No.960/2025. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 4) For hearing of CMA No.638/2025 5) For hearing of CMA No.287/2025 26.08.2025. Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, A.A.G., Sindh. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar, Advocate for Respondent No.16. ________________ Learned counsel for the appellant submits that in fact this appeal has become infructuous as his claim has been decided by the Supreme Court holding the appellant entitled for compensation. However, learned counsel submits he being officer of the Court has brought the impugned order to the notice of this Court whereby the learned Single Judge, in violation of the Supreme Court order putting embargo on transaction of the government land has directed the Revenue Department to issue a challan of the subject land which shall be submitted with the Nazir and the plaintiff shall deposit the differential amount. Learned AAG Sindh who is present in Court when reminded of the direction of the Supreme Court has agreed that the order will be examined by the learned Advocate General Sindh and if necessary an appeal would be filed against it. Learned counsel for the appellant is satisfied. This appeal is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
